query:
SELECT c.id, c.tenant_id as claim_tenant_id, c.claim_number,
       ap.id as policy_id, ap.tenant_id as policy_tenant_id, ap.is_active
FROM claims c
LEFT JOIN automation_policies ap ON c.tenant_id = ap.tenant_id AND ap.is_active = 1
LIMIT 5;
